subgoals.description: Confirm pub can accommodate 160 people and has a quiet corner for the webinar segment
subgoals.success_criterion: Pub confirms capacity and space allocation for 160 people and quiet area

subgoals.description: Arrange vegan menu options with the pub's catering service
subgoals.success_criterion: Vegan menu confirmed and cost details provided

subgoals.description: Calculate total deposit amount to ensure it does not exceed £300
Send confirmation of all arrangements to stakeholders before 5 PM
subgoals.success_criterion: Confirmation email sent and received by all parties before 5 PM
